subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God, in that Thou hast made manifest that which lay concealed in Thy knowledge and for that which Thou hast expounded unto Thy servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما اظهرت ما هو المکنون فی علمک و بینت للعباد ما یقربهم الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment
